pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 11; keeping 1.8 would result in incorrect bytecode or compilation errors if source code uses Java 11 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions (like 0.7.5) do not support Java 11 bytecode, causing runtime failures during code coverage execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace javax.inject removed from JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject was removed from the JDK in Java 11; without the explicit dependency, compilation fails for classes using @Inject.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace javax.annotation removed from JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation was removed from the JDK in Java 11; without the explicit dependency, compilation fails for classes using annotations like @PostConstruct.
